case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS BLANKE, BRIDGET F.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $772.36 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKE, BRIDGET F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKE, BRIDGET F.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-11-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-21-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKE, BRIDGET F.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANKE, BRIDGET F. $514.36 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $556.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $23.47 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKE, BRIDGET F.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $615.77 AS TO DEFENDANT BLANKE, BRIDGET F.
